_info: Global DataCreator ETL — single source of truth for all paths and settings.
_info2: This file is auto-copied next to the .exe on every build/publish.
_info3: Edit here and rebuild — bat scripts and application both read this file.

Paths._help: Leave empty = auto-resolve relative to the exe (recommended).

Database._help: Leave a field empty to keep the Config/dbsettings.json default.

Application._help: Set to null/0 to keep Config/appsettings.json defaults. Leave ExportSubDirectory/ImportSubDirectory empty to keep defaults.
